creator: ighor@ighor.ru
text:
System was updated to 8.2-STABLE from 8.2-RELEASE and has ZFS RAIDZ2
with 6 hdds (500Gb each). Total capacity was (6-2)*500, approx 2T. Each
hdd is conencted to one the same ICH10 controller, visible to BIOS and
works stable. When one(any) HDD is removed system fails to boot from
degraded ZFS RAIDZ2.

Fix: 

8.2-RELEASE works fine
How-To-Repeat: Remove one of 6 HDDs from RAIDZ2 on 8.2-STABLE - system will not boot
from degraded RAIDZ2.
